references.hebrew: וְאֶת־אִיזֶ֜בֶל יֹאכְל֧וּ הַכְּלָבִ֛ים בְּחֵ֥לֶק יִזְרְעֶ֖אל וְאֵ֣ין קֹבֵ֑ר וַיִּפְתַּ֥ח הַדֶּ֖לֶת וַיָּנֹֽס׃
references.english: The dogs shall devour Jezebel in the field of Jezreel, with none to bury her.” Then he opened the door and fled.

references.hebrew: כׇּל־חֹשֶׁךְ֮ טָמ֢וּן לִצְפּ֫וּנָ֥יו תְּ֭אׇכְלֵהוּ אֵ֣שׁ לֹא־נֻפָּ֑ח יֵ֖רַע שָׂרִ֣יד בְּאׇהֳלֽוֹ׃
references.english:
Utter darkness waits for his treasured ones;
A fire, fanned by no one, will consume him;
Who survives in his tent will be crushed.

The Sovereign awoke as from sleep—
like a warrior shaking offishaking off Meaning of Heb. uncertain. wine—
